response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed video content from 00:00 to 05:01. 2. Identified the initial 3D intro segment (00:00-02:53) as having no vocal music. 3. Identified the song 'dahlah.' performed by Kaela Kovalskia starting at 02:53. 4. Used search to find lyrics for 'dahlah.' by Kaela Kovalskia. 5. Confirmed the lyrics match the English-language version performed in the video. 6. Constructed the final JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing a 3D performance by Kaela Kovalskia, featuring her original song 'dahlah.'. The video includes an introductory segment followed by a full vocal performance of the song.

scenes.description: The video begins with a 3D title card for '3D Redebut Live Déjàvu'. It transitions to a 3D environment where Kaela Kovalskia walks through a street and enters a room. No vocal music is playing.
Kaela Kovalskia performs her original song 'dahlah.'. The video shows her singing and interacting with objects in the 3D room. The title 'dahlah. by Kaela Kovalskia' appears on an old TV set.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Dahlah saja
Walk it off and go

Isn't this a thing that you're used to?
Disappointed and feeling blue
When the world doesn't go the way you want it to?
Oh oh
And maybe now is just the perfect time
To let it go and just unwind
There's no need to ask why ever again

Just let it go
The answer you've been looking for
No need to be sad about it, just try to get through your day
Just let it go, then maybe in the end you'll know
You got what it takes to get through the ache and still win the day

Dahlah saja, oh, dahlah saja
Walk it off and go

Walk it off and go

When your feelings are barely there
Up to a point of pure despair
When you have given it your all, but ends in vain
